sub_modules.sqrt_nr_initial_guess: Computes the zero-input flag and fixed-point Newton-Raphson initial estimate.
sub_modules.sqrt_nr_divide: Computes the fixed-point scaled division term X/y using widened intermediate arithmetic and saturation.
sub_modules.sqrt_nr_iteration: Computes the next Newton-Raphson estimate as the average of the current estimate and division term.
sub_modules.sqrt_nr_convergence: Compares consecutive estimates and asserts convergence when their difference is at most one LSB.
